text: Target venue is the Journal of Robust Machine Intelligence (double-blind).
papercheck caught pooled k-fold; switched to leave-one-subject-out to avoid identity leakage.
Reviewer 2 said the baseline is weak and wants a Transformer comparison.
Should the ablation cover channel dropout as well as jitter?
lang.hype flagged 'groundbreaking' in the intro; rewrote the opening soberly.
